_meta.description: Active signal board — unread/open signals only. All roles read this single file and filter by their 'to' field.
_meta.protocol: When you complete a task: update status to 'done' and run: node scripts/signal-done.js <signal-id>. To send a new signal: node scripts/signal-send.js

signals.message: M26/M27/M28 design specs ready for implementation at .shared/outputs/designer/. Each spec includes complete Tailwind classes, component layouts, state variants, responsive breakpoints, and Lucide icon references. Key notes: (1) M26 needs new tailwind animation for panel but no config changes. (2) M27 avatar colors use hash(userId)%%5 to pick from 5 color variants. (3) M28 requires 5 new keyframes added to tailwind.config.ts (glow-pulse, bounce-dot, waveform-bar, panel-up, panel-scale) — see spec section 14.

M26/M27/M28 design specs complete. All 3 files saved to .shared/outputs/designer/: m26-registration-approval-spec.md (pending page, signin error states, admin approval table with filter tabs, rejection modal), m27-discussions-spec.md (CommentThread/CommentCard/CommentForm, flat threading, admin moderation page, empty states), m28-ai-assistant-spec.md (floating button with glow, slide-up/side panel, voice states, Coach Ney persona, idle nudge, suggestion chips, plan limits). All specs use existing design tokens and Tailwind classes from design-system.md.

M26 Registration Approval needs UI specs: (1) /auth/pending page — 'account under review' message shown after signup. (2) /auth/signin error states for pending/rejected/suspended users. (3) /admin/users page — status column, filter tabs (All/Pending/Approved/Rejected/Suspended), approve/reject buttons with optional statusNote textarea.

M26 Registration Approval backend ready. Test points: (1) POST /api/auth/signup returns {success:true, status:'pending'}. (2) Sign-in with pending user returns error 'Your account is pending approval'. (3) Sign-in with rejected user returns 'Your registration was not approved'. (4) Sign-in with suspended user returns 'Your account has been suspended'. (5) PATCH /api/admin/users/[id] with {status:'approved'} sets approvedAt+approvedBy. (6) GET /api/admin/users?status=pending filters by status. (7) After approval, user can sign in normally.

M26 Registration Approval — backend complete. Schema: added status/statusNote/approvedAt/approvedBy to User + @@index([status]). Signup API returns pending. Auth checks status before login (pending/rejected/suspended blocked). Admin PATCH /api/admin/users/[id] for approve/reject with statusNote. GET /api/admin/users?status=pending filter. Data migration script: scripts/migrate-user-status.ts. Prisma generate done, 0 TS errors. NEEDS: prisma db push + run migrate-user-status.ts on production. Builder/Designer still need /auth/pending page and admin UI updates.
BUG-005 fixed. Created /api/public/plans (unauthenticated) and updated pricing page to use it. Pushed and deploying.

M19 + M20 data delivered this session.

## M19 — Arcade Challenge Seed Data
File: .shared/outputs/data/arcade-challenges-seed.json
- 3 bundles × 10 challenges = 30 challenges total
- Bundle 0: Confidence & Authority (intermediate) — Gladiator, Wall Street, Social Network, Any Given Sunday, A Few Good Men, Network, Margin Call, Catch Me If You Can, Coach Carter, King's Speech
- Bundle 1: Empathy & Warmth (beginner) — Jerry Maguire, Good Will Hunting, Dead Poets Society, Pursuit of Happyness, Before Sunrise, Forrest Gump, When Harry Met Sally, Rain Man, Good Will Hunting
- Bundle 2: Tension & Conflict (advanced) — Whiplash, Silence of the Lambs, Inglourious Basterds, No Country for Old Men, 12 Angry Men, Glengarry Glen Ross, Dark Knight, Shawshank, A Few Good Men, Lincoln
- Mix: 15 facial + 15 gesture challenges
- referenceImageUrl = null (MVP description-only scoring per spec)
- All descriptions drawn from library films

## M20 — Screenplay Source Audit
File: .shared/outputs/data/m20-screenplay-audit.json
- 65 clips audited
- 53 have screenplay sources (all imsdb.com)
- 12 have null sources (Iron Man 2, The Intern, There Will Be Blood, Marriage Story, Frost/Nixon + partial clips whose film is covered by other clips)
- Primary selector: td.scrtext pre
- CRITICAL FINDINGS for Backend Engineer:
  - 2 URL encoding issues: King's Speech (raw apostrophe vs %27) and Schindler's List (needs %27)
  - 12 Angry Men uses 'Twelve-Angry-Men.html' slug (not '12-Angry-Men')
  - Caching by film = 32 unique HTTP requests max (not 53)
  - Recommended: 500ms delay between requests, cheerio for parsing

Ready for Backend Engineer to implement screenplay-crawler.ts.

Artifact: .shared/outputs/design/bug-004-film-filter-fix.md

Spec covers:

NEW MILESTONE TO DOCUMENT: M16 — Learning Materials Builder.

When approved by Tester, log in activity-log.md:

## What to document
- New admin-only section at /admin/crawl-jobs
- What a crawl job is: admin defines skill/technique + keywords → system searches YouTube → AI scores each result for relevance → admin approves/rejects
- New Prisma models: CrawlJob, CrawlResult
- New services: youtube-crawler.ts (YouTube Data API v3), clip-relevance-scorer.ts (GPT-4o relevance scoring)
- Approve flow: creates Clip + auto-generates ObservationGuide + PracticeSteps
- Special tactics system: 40+ named communication techniques beyond 5 standard categories (from communication-tactics.json)
- New env var required: YOUTUBE_API_KEY

## Strategic significance
This milestone shifts seeneyu from manual content curation to semi-automated content discovery. Admin can now target highly specific communication skills (Power Pause, Triangle Gaze, Proxemic Management, etc.) not covered in standard clip categories.
